home.title: Welcome to LDesign Router
home.subtitle: A powerful, flexible, and easy-to-use Vue 3 routing solution

deviceAdaptive.title: Device Adaptive
deviceAdaptive.description: Automatically adjust routes and components based on device type for optimal user experience

tabManagement.title: Tab Management
tabManagement.description: Support multi-tab navigation with drag-and-drop sorting and persistent storage

breadcrumbs.title: Breadcrumb Navigation
breadcrumbs.description: Automatically generate breadcrumb navigation to help users understand current location

caching.title: Smart Caching
caching.description: Support multiple caching strategies to improve application performance and user experience

animations.title: Route Animations
animations.description: Rich route transition animation effects to make applications more vivid and interesting

permissions.title: Permission Management
permissions.description: Complete permission control system with fine-grained role and permission management

themes.title: Theme Switching
themes.description: Support multiple theme switching including light/dark mode and custom themes

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Complete internationalization support for easy multi-language application development

about.title: About LDesign Router
about.subtitle: Learn about our design philosophy, technical architecture, and core features

intro.title: Project Introduction
intro.description: LDesign Router is a modern routing solution designed specifically for Vue 3. It not only provides basic routing functionality but also integrates advanced features such as device adaptation, tab management, permission control, and theme switching to help developers quickly build feature-rich single-page applications.

architecture.title: Architecture Design
architecture.description: Adopts layered architecture design with clear module responsibilities, easy to extend and maintain.

deviceAdaptive.title: Device Adaptive Routing
deviceAdaptive.description: Automatically select the most suitable components and layouts based on user device type (desktop, tablet, mobile).

tabManagement.title: Multi-tab Management
tabManagement.description: Provides complete tab management functionality with support for adding, deleting, drag-and-drop sorting, and more.

caching.title: Smart Caching System
caching.description: Supports multiple caching strategies including LRU, LFU, FIFO, effectively improving application performance.

animations.title: Route Animation Effects
animations.description: Built-in multiple route transition animations with support for custom animation effects.

performance.title: Performance Metrics
performance.description: We are committed to providing high-performance routing solutions. Here are some key performance indicators.

installation.question: How to install LDesign Router?
installation.answer: You can install via npm or yarn: npm install @ldesign/router or yarn add @ldesign/router

configuration.question: How to configure the router?
configuration.answer: Use the createLDesignRouter function to create a router instance with route configuration and options. See documentation for detailed configuration.

performance.question: How is the performance?
performance.answer: LDesign Router is performance-optimized with features like lazy loading and caching to effectively improve application performance.

compatibility.question: What about compatibility?
compatibility.answer: Fully compatible with Vue 3, supports Composition API, and seamlessly integrates with the existing Vue ecosystem.

support.question: How to get technical support?
support.answer: You can get technical support through email, GitHub Issues, or online documentation. Our team will respond to your questions promptly.

success.title: Message Sent Successfully!
success.message: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
